description: Civista Bancshares, Inc. operates as the financial holding company for Civista Bank that provides banking services in the United States. The company offers personal and commercial checking accounts; retirement, money market, time, and savings accounts; safe deposit boxes; wire transfers; and automated teller services. It also provides internet banking; ACH origination; telephone banking; and mobile/digital banking services, as well as remote deposit capture banking services for retail and business customers. In addition, the company offers time deposits that consist of certificates of deposit,
